hero_sub: Fast, Honest, Affordable. Locally owned and operated by two college students who actually care about your community.
about_headline: Not a Franchise. Just Two Local Guys.
about_text: Palmetto Haul Co. was founded by Hank and Jacob — two Charleston college students who wanted to build something real in their community. When you call us, you get us. No subcontractors, no bait-and-switch pricing, just honest work at fair prices.
cta_sub: Get a free, no-pressure quote in minutes. We'll give you an upfront price — no surprises.
